briefdescription.para: Define Driver instance of all sub-core included in the design.
This function configures Video Timing Controller (VTC).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVtc core instance.
is a pointer to the XV_SdiTx core instance.

inbodydescription.para: When compensating the vtc horizontal timing parameters for the pixel mode (quad or dual) rounding errors might be introduced (due to the divide) If this happens, the vtc total horizontal blanking is less than the sdi tx horizontal blanking. As a result the sdi tx vid out bridge is not able to lock to the incoming video stream. This process will check the horizontal blank timing and compensate for this condition. Calculate sdi tx horizontal blanking

briefdescription.para: This function reports list of cores included in Video Processing Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the SDI TX SS timing information.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the GT is ready for TX configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the Tx over flow happens.

parameterdescription.para: is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the Tx under flow happens.

parameterdescription.para: is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the Tx CE align errors happens.

parameterdescription.para: is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the Tx Axi4s video lock bridge happens.

parameterdescription.para: is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function register's all sub-core ISR's with interrupt controller and any subsystem level call back function with requisite sub-core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function queries the subsystem instance if the current mode is 3GB DL or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: TRUE - If current mode is 3GB DL FALSE - If current mode is not 3GB DL

briefdescription.para: This function calls the interrupt handler for SDI TX.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SDI TX Subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function queries the subsystem instance configuration to determine the included sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para: For each sub-core that is present in the design the sub-core driver instance is binded with the subsystem sub-core driver handle

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the video subsystem and included sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the subsystem. Initialization includes setting up the instance data for top level as well as all included sub-core therein, and ensuring the hardware is in a known stable state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
points to the configuration structure associated with the subsystem instance.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization is successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ----------------------- --------------------------------------------- (XV_SDITXSS_HANDLER_GTREADY) GtReadyCallback (XV_SDITXSS_HANDLER_OVERFLOW) OverFlowCallback (XV_SDITXSS_HANDLER_UNDERFLOW) UnderFlowCallback (XV_SDITXSS_HANDLER_CEALIGN) CeAlignErrCallback (XV_SDITXSS_HANDLER_AXI4SVIDLOCK) Axi4sVidLockCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SDI TX Subsystem instance.
specifies the type of handler.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This macro disables the SDI TX peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the ST352 value to be used from DS2 instead of DS3 register in C stream of the SDI TX Ss core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the insertion of ST352 in C stream of the SDI TX Ss core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function Set the video format of the SDI TX Ss core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTxSs core instance.
is a variable of type XVidC_ColorFormat.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the SDI TX stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function configures SDI TX stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function returns the pointer to SDI TX SS video stream payload ID.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance
specifies which of the pointer of PayloadId to be returned

briefdescription.para: This function returns the pointer to SDI TX SS video transport.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function returns the pointer to SDI TX SS video stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance
specifies which video stream's pointer to be returned

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the SDI TX SS video stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance
specifies the settings for the video stream

briefdescription.para: This function reports stream errors detected.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function prints the SDI TX SS information.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function prints the SDI TX SS debug information.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance
specifies if VTC block is currently stable or not.

simplesect.para: A known issue on the VTC causes it to require a stable clock before the registers may be access. VtcFlag is used to decide whether VTC can be read or not.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the SDI TX SS stream information.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the video stream is up.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function is used to configure the SDI TX interrupts that are to be handled by the application.

detaileddescription.para: Refer to xv_sditxss_hw.h for interrupt masks.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance
Indicates Mask for enable interrupts.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to configure the SDI TX interrupts that are to be handled by the application.

detaileddescription.para: Refer to xv_sditxss_hw.h for interrupt masks.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance
Indicates Mask for disabling interrupts.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to update the Eotf and colorimetry fields of stream video structure.

detaileddescription.para: If SDI TX is already streaming, then this function updates the payload registers.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance
is a variable of type XVidC_Eotf
is a variable of type XVidC_ColorStd

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_SdiTxSs *InstancePtr, XVidC_VideoMode VideoMode, XSdiVid_TransMode SdiMode, u8 DataStream)
memberdef.name: XV_SdiTxSs_GetPayload

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the final ST352 payload value for all SDI modes with given video mode and SDI data stream number.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTxSs core instance.
is a variable of type XVidC_VideoMode.
is a variable of type XSdiVid_TransMode.
is the stream number for which payload is calculated.

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_SdiTxSs *InstancePtr, XV_SdiTx_StreamSelId SelId, u32 Data, u8 StreamId)
memberdef.name: XV_SdiTxSs_SetStream

briefdescription.para: This function sets the SDI TXSs stream parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTxSs core instance.

specifies which parameter of the stream to be set.
0 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_VMID
1 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_COLORFORMAT
2 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_BPC
3 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_PPC
4 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_ASPECTRATIO
5 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_STANDARD
6 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_STREAMINTERLACE
7 = XV_SDITX_STREAMSELID_CHANNEL
specifies what data to be set for the selected parameter.
specifies which of the streams to be set.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if TimingPtr is not derived

briefdescription.para: This function sets the SDI TXSS core settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiTxSs core instance.

specifies which parameter of the stream to be set.
0 = XV_SDITXSS_CORESELID_INSERTCRC
1 = XV_SDITXSS_CORESELID_INSERTST352
2 = XV_SDITXSS_CORESELID_ST352OVERWRITE
3 = XV_SDITXSS_CORESELID_INSERTSYNCBIT
4 = XV_SDITXSS_CORESELID_SDBITREPBYPASS
5 = XV_SDITXSS_CORESELID_USEANCIN
6 = XV_SDITXSS_CORESELID_INSERTLN
7 = XV_SDITXSS_CORESELID_INSERTEDH
specifies what data to be set for the selected parameter.

briefdescription.para: This function enable the YUV444/RGB 10bit support SDI TX SS video stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function disable the YUV444/RGB 10bit support SDI TX SS video stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_SdiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This is the main file for Xilinx SDI TX core.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xv_sditxss.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 jsr 07/17/17 Initial release. 2.00 kar 01/25/18 Second release. jsr 02/23/2018 Added YUV420 color format support jsr 03/02/2018 Added core settings API 2.1 jsr 07/03/2018 Corrected 720x480_60_I to be 720x486_60_I for SD mode 2.2 jsr 10/01/2018 Programming the Field register for 720x480_60_I SD mode 3.0 vve 10/03/18 Add support for ST352 in C Stream
